model_reason: Comprehensive audit task. Frontend visual + Playwright capture. Well-defined SPEC. No code modification. Per Model Optimization Matrix (Layer 1 §10) Sonnet 4.6 ideal for comprehensive audit pattern. No escalation triggered (no cross-cutting build break or auth corruption).

documented_exceptions: Created 3 *.local.mjs scripts in UZGPLUS root for audit-runner orchestration; deleted post-audit. Verified via git status — 0 staged or committed source changes.
Seeded 1 row in enta_profiles table for sovereign user (lane02-test-sovereign@uzg.local) to bypass ENTA gate for audit purposes; deleted post-audit.

recommended_next_sprints_top3.name: Sprint Fix-i18n-A
recommended_next_sprints_top3.rationale: Patches languageFoundation.js:7430 resolver to honor fallback param. Single-file CRITICAL surgical fix protects ALL future i18n work from raw key leaks.

recommended_next_sprints_top3.name: Sprint Fix-Compose-Layout
recommended_next_sprints_top3.rationale: CSS override of composer container's oval/circle border-radius. Most NTS-visible single bug per 2026-05-03 evidence.

recommended_next_sprints_top3.name: Sprint Fix-Theme-A
recommended_next_sprints_top3.rationale: Apply neutral-dark canvas (#0a0a0f) to body / app-shell across HOME social pages. Closes app-wide background drift from V2 UI Upgrade canon.

kl_extensions.title: Architectural feature shipping must include LANG_OS retrofit + theme retrofit in same wave
kl_extensions.summary: PR #114 Fix-3 keystone shipped V2 HOME feed but did not retrofit appT() wrappers nor neutral-dark canvas. Within 24h NTS reported polish bugs the architectural sprint should have caught.

kl_extensions.title: Resolver-level i18n bug must be fixed at resolver, not at single key
kl_extensions.summary: PR #119 patched common.back symptom but languageFoundation.js:7430 resolver still ignores fallback. Same pattern re-leaked on system.uReward.shell.closeShellAria. Always audit resolver when forbidden pattern surfaces.

kl_extensions.title: Audit harness needs ENTA-Root pre-state seeding for HOME route capture
kl_extensions.summary: Lane_01 auth-bypass fixture (PR #94) authenticates user but doesn't seed enta_profile. Sovereign without ENTA Root redirects to /enta on every HOME route, hiding actual HOME state. Future fixture should accept seedEntaRoot:true flag.
